name: Rainbow Popcorn Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 package Strawberry gelatin powder, or lime gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the popped corn into a bowl and add peanuts if desired.
2. In a one-quart saucepan, combine the corn syrup and sugar. Cook, stirring with a wooden spoon, until the sugar dissolves.
3. Without stirring, bring the mixture to a full rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat and add the gelatin.
5. Stir until the gelatin is dissolved and add the food coloring.
6. Pour over the popcorn and mix.
7. Form into balls with buttered hands.
